# Campaign Brief: Cedar Loop Market

Create a square social launch image for Cedar Loop Market. Use only the copy set with status `approved_current`. Old pilot, partnership, and draft copy must not be used as active brand copy.

## Copy candidates

| status | brand name | launch message | date line | CTA | notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| approved_current | Cedar Loop Market | Fresh stalls, short walks, local makers. | Opening Saturdays in June | Meet us on the loop | Use this row for the current launch. |
| archived_night_market | Cedar Loop Night Market | Neon nights, exclusive bites. | Fridays after dark | Get on the list | Old night-market pilot. Do not use. |
| draft_luxury | Cedar Loop Market | Curated luxury finds for the city set. | Opening this fall | Book VIP access | Wrong luxury direction. Do not use. |
| test_partner_realestate | Cedar Loop District | Downtown skyline living starts here. | Leasing now | Tour the residences | Partner real-estate copy from a test campaign. Do not use. |

## Optional copy

The following lines are optional and should be used only if they do not crowd the image:

- Produce, flowers, bread, ceramics
- A walkable makers market

## Audience and goal

The image should appeal to neighborhood residents, families, local food shoppers, and craft buyers. It should feel friendly and walkable, not like a luxury fashion event, downtown skyline campaign, or neon nightlife poster.

## File precedence

- campaign_brief.md is authoritative for required copy.
- visual_rules.json overrides market_launch.pdf for machine-readable visual constraints.
- platform_specs.txt overrides template.yaml for final size, margins, and safe areas.
- deprecated_assets.json overrides asset_manifest.json for asset eligibility.
